summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory candidates. No security-sensitive hydrated item was present, no closure is allowed by job frontmatter, and no merge recommendation is safe because the artifact does not include a complete merge preflight with passed Codex /review and resolved review findings. Each PR should remain open for its own maintainer review path.
